2605.07717.title: The AI-Native Large-Scale Agile Software Development Manifesto
2605.07717.paper_summary: Despite the widespread adoption of agile methods, achieving true agility at scale remains elusive. Large-scale agile frameworks remain largely human-centric and manual, relying on coordination meetings, artifact synchronization, and role-based handoffs that inhibit real-time adaptation. Meanwhile, rapid advances in AI, particularly large language models, have begun transforming software engineering, yet their potential for organizational-level agility remains underexplored. We present the AI-Native Large-Scale Agile Software Development Manifesto: a set of values and principles that redefine how large-scale software development is organized when AI becomes a first-class participant rather than a peripheral tool. The manifesto is grounded in six principles, parallel processes, intent-driven teams, living knowledge, verification-first assurance, orchestrated agent workforces, and reusable blueprints, that together shift development from a meeting-driven, document-heavy, sequential process to an intelligent, adaptive, continuously learning system.
2605.07717.paper_summary_zh: 儘管敏捷方法被廣泛採用，但在大規模上實現真正的敏捷性仍然難以捉摸。大規模的敏捷框架仍然主要以人為中心且手動，依賴協調會議、工件同步和基於角色的交接，這些都抑制了即時適應。與此同時，人工智慧的快速進步，特別是大型語言模型，已經開始改變軟體工程，但它們在組織層級的敏捷性潛力仍然未被充分探索。我們提出了 AI 原生大規模敏捷軟體開發宣言：一套價值觀和原則，重新定義當 AI 成為一個一級參與者而非邊緣工具時，大規模軟體開發的組織方式。該宣言基於六個原則：平行過程、意圖驅動的團隊、活的知識、驗證優先的保證、協調的代理工作隊伍和可重用的藍圖，這些原則共同將開發從以會議為驅動、文檔繁重、線性過程轉變為一個智能、自適應、持續學習的系統。
2605.07717.author: Ricardo Britto et.al.
2605.07717.authors: Ricardo Britto, Fredrik Palmgren, Nishrith Saini, Marcus Ohlin
